title: [Nyessem, Baths]
description: A ruby-studded tunnel opens on a steam-filled room heated by a series of braziers in one corner.  Next to them, a polished marble basin is filled with cool, clear water.  A long stone table set with refreshments sits before a wall with small holes to hold personal effects.  A wide mirror edged with lines of glittering gemstones dominates the opposite wall.  At the mirror's heart is a large rune-etched diamond.
